examples: The bedroom walls would be papered with chintz.
Beneath that chintz housecoat beats a heart of pure evil.
Secretary: She just needs to know if you want the chintz or the chenille in the dining room.
She packed a set of soft chintz bags and waved with her fingertips at the door.
The pre-Olympics boom of luxury hotels includes this Knightsbridge property, which opened in May 2012 and eschews British florals and Empire-era chintz for a modernized 1920s look.
